channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overflowing bin, 16th July
item.description:
Over flowing bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northwold Road, West Hackney, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Thicket Road, 16th July
item.description:
Litter has been spread across Thicket Road just past the railway bridge, please can this be cleaned up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Anerley Park Road, 16th July
item.description:
Litter at the end of Anerley Park Road needs cleaning up. Litter along the whole road needs cleaning up to be honest, not sure it gets cleaned up at all

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign very faded, 16th July
item.description:
Sign is very faded and hard to read in the dark. Delivery drivers always struggle to deliver to Ridgemount Close. Please can this be repainted and also repositioned higher so it can be seen above the cars that are always parked in it's visual sightline from the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip cabinet, 16th July
item.description:
A cabinet has been fly tipped at the end of Ridgemount Close junction onto Anerley Park Road. It's been here 1 week already. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 16th July
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coverdale Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Abandoned bike on pavement, 16th July
item.description:
Blocking public pathway, abandoned nuisance item

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-5, Dock Hill Avenue, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, London

item.title: Constant rubbish outside number 1 oakmere road, 16th July
item.description:
Now all over street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakmere Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: A Fly-tip Small - Up to 3 black bags problem has been found, 16th July

item.title: Mound in tarmac, 16th July
item.description:
The road surface on the roundabout has mounded up causing a serious risk to motorists and motorcycles
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 2 and 4 Donaldson road, 16th July
item.description:
Please clean up beer bottles left on street. Ability to upload pictures not working
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip furniture, 16th July
item.description:
Chest of drawers

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Cintra Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and leaf debris, 16th July
item.description:
Litter left over from concerts and lots of leaf debris on path and road blocking drains
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Cintra Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 16th July
item.description:
There is a pile of at least 10 black refuse sacks by the green of Hickin close near house 28
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prentiss Court, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown Public Alley, 16th July
item.description:
Overgrown bushes and trees from railway on public footpath, have to duck below them to get past.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Crayford Road, Crayford, Dartford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sheet metal dumped on path, 16th July
item.description:
Large piece of painted sheet metal was dumped on the pavement about a week ago

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular flytipping, 16th July
item.description:
Regular spot for flytipoing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kashgar Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Still here!, 16th July
item.description:
I reported this days ago and despite having seen Lewisham’s bulk waste collection vehicle 2 roads away yesterday, this is now obstructing the pavement fully.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106-168, Bell Green Lane, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
